case_title: BRIONES, DOMINADOR MR. et al VS LEE, RICHARD MR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY BRIONES, DOMINADOR MR. BRIONES, HERMINIGILDA MRS. AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RICHARD MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. LETTER TO RICHARD LEE RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-20-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF SEP-21-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RICHARD MR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIONES, DOMINADOR MR. BRIONES, HERMINIGILDA MRS. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, RICHARD MR. $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,845.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-08-1993, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIONES, DOMINADOR MR. BRIONES, HERMINIGILDA MRS. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, RICHARD MR. $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,245.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RICHARD MR.
NOTE:A 2ND ORIG.SATISFACTION FOR:"MRS. HERMINIGILD A BRIONES FILED",BUT DEFT.IS ONLY MR. RICHARD LEE.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, RICHARD MR. HEARING SET FOR NOV-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
